body:
**At Grove, safety, quality, and reliability are at the forefront of everything we do. Whether you're in need of installations, repairs, maintenance, or upgrades, you can rely on us to deliver timely and cost-effective solutions without compromising on quality.**

**Services We Provide:**

**Commercial Electrical Services:**

* Office Building Wiring
* Retail Store Electrical Systems
* Restaurant and Hospitality Electrical Solutions
* Warehouse and Industrial Facility Wiring
* Electrical System Upgrades
* Lighting Design and Installation
* Energy-efficient Solutions
* EICR’s and all aspects of Electrical Testing and Certification



**Industrial Electrical Services:**

* Machinery Wiring and Installation
* Control Panel Design and Installation
* Motor Controls and Automation
* Plant Electrical Maintenance
* Emergency Electrical Services
* Electrical Safety Audits and Compliance
* EICR’s and all aspects of Electrical Testing and Certification



**Electrical Maintenance and Repairs:**

* Routine Maintenance Checks
* Electrical System Inspections
* Emergency Repairs
* Rewiring and Circuit Repair
* E﻿lectrical Compliance

**Data and Communication Wiring:**

* Structured Cabling Installation
* Network Wiring and Configuration
* Fiber Optic Cabling
title: Services
